name: MOZAYYX Acquisition Corp.
business: MOZAYYX Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to pursue a business combination. It has no operations and has not selected any target. It expects to focus on high-growth sectors such as fintech, energy, cybersecurity, infrastructure, robotics, and communications.

exposures.sentence: We intend to capitalize on the investment, operational, and domain expertise as well as the extensive social and professional capital of our management team, board, and advisors across key high-growth sectors, including fintech, energy, cybersecurity, infrastructure, robotics, and communications.
